rationale: Cycle-1 plan is internally consistent with the registered meaning (verification half of retires only), the live data surface (4 plan-version retirements), and the repository trust model. Closed entry shape + pinned types, must_not_govern_new_work===true, unique plan_version, active_plan not superseded, superseded_by resolution without self/dangling/cycle, and disk-resolved terminal sha256 via sanctioned canonicalize/sha256hex are all normative and test-discriminated. Node-backed paths are correctly marked UNREPRESENTABLE under the current schema and short-circuit deterministically rather than being silently omitted or half-implemented; full three-surface verifier is explicitly deferred without dead claims. READ-ONLY is enforced by an allowlist oracle over the runtime surface (no fs writers, no child_process/vm/dynamic load, no scripts/ leakage) with honest NON-CLAIM that it is strong static evidence, not a sandbox proof. Boundary is zero-dependency, clotho-free, sole merkle-dag/vendor.mjs import. Design-level surface-applicability ruling is anchored in existing content-addressed artifacts rather than a CHANGE-PROTOCOL edit, matching The Eye's build-mode recalibration. Ingestion is fail-closed and closed-union (manifest-anchored discovery + snapshot digest + realpath containment) so a present SUPERSEDED record or supersedes edge cannot be dropped while still returning consistent. Golden path over real CURRENT-AUTHORITY and the per-check negative fixtures match the stated verdict conditions. No remaining contradiction with pre-review, NON-CLAIMs, or cycle-1 non-goals; nothing is required of the plan that was explicitly disclaimed. Ratify AS-IS.
